## Summary

<!-- One-sentence description of the change. What does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Select the type that best describes this PR. Delete the others. -->

- **feat**: new feature
- **fix**: bug fix
- **refactor**: code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- **test**: adding or updating tests
- **docs**: documentation only
- **build**: build system, CI, or dependency changes
- **chore**: maintenance, tooling, or other non-functional changes

## Checklist

<!--
Before opening the PR, confirm each box by replacing [ ] with [x].
If a box does not apply, mark it as [N/A].
-->

- [ ] I ran `uv run poe verify` locally and all checks pass
- [ ] My commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] My changes include or update tests for new/modified behavior
- [ ] My changes include or update documentation (`README.md`, `ARCH.md`, `docs/`) if needed
- [ ] I considered edge cases: error paths, missing files, stale cache, null values
